user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
**Priority:** LOW  
**Category:** Follow-up - Resolution Confirmation  

**Draft Response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I hope this message finds you well! Just circling back on your ticket [#TicketNumber] from 5 days ago, which we marked as resolved after [briefly reference the issue/solution, e.g., "fixing the login issue and resetting your password"].

Everything still running smoothly on your end? If any issues pop up or if there's anything else I can assist with, just reply here—I'm here to help.

Best regards,  
Compass  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to draft a professional follow-up response that addressed the user's specific request.
